proposal1.heroHeadline: IFX is losing 1,000 hours a year on manual proposals. Here's why.
proposal1.heroSubheadline: Currently, IFX spends hours crafting each proposal. With our system, generate them in 47 seconds, tailored to your IT services.
proposal1.problemsIntro: These are not just inconveniences. They are ongoing losses.

problems.title: Time Siphon
problems.description: Every hour spent drafting proposals is an hour not spent closing deals. With a team of 7, the manual process costs IFX significant revenue potential.

problems.title: Opportunity Drain
problems.description: Delayed proposals mean lost opportunities. Each day a proposal is late, potential clients turn elsewhere, costing IFX thousands in lost contracts.

problems.title: Brand Inconsistency
problems.description: Manually crafted proposals risk inconsistent branding. Each inconsistency undermines IFX's 20-year reputation, potentially devaluing your trusted brand.

problems.title: Human Error
problems.description: Mistakes in proposals lead to client confusion and lost deals. Each error chips away at trust, costing IFX credibility and potential revenue.

problems.title: Resource Drain
problems.description: Creating proposals manually ties up valuable resources. This inefficiency diverts focus from strategic growth areas, costing IFX opportunity and expansion.

problems.title: Competitive Lag
problems.description: Slow proposal turnarounds mean IFX lags behind faster competitors. This delay can cost IFX contracts worth thousands, undermining market position.

proposal1.solutionIntro: Meet the system that addresses all of the above.

solutions.title: Instant Proposal Generation
solutions.description: Currently, proposals take hours of manual work. With this system, generate branded, client-ready proposals in under 60 seconds.

solutions.title: Consistent Branding
solutions.description: Currently, manual proposals risk brand inconsistency. The system ensures every proposal aligns with IFX's trusted 20-year image.

solutions.title: Error Reduction
solutions.description: Currently, human errors can slip into proposals. This system eliminates errors, ensuring clarity and precision every time.

solutions.title: Resource Optimization
solutions.description: Currently, resources are tied up in manual processes. The system frees up time for strategic initiatives, driving growth.

solutions.title: Competitive Edge
solutions.description: Currently, proposal delays put IFX behind competitors. With fast proposal generation, IFX stays ahead, capturing more opportunities.

proposal1.whyUsIntro: Four reasons this works. Not marketing claims. Engineering facts.

whyUsCards.title: Speed
whyUsCards.description: Every hour your team spends writing proposals is an hour not spent closing deals. This system gives those hours back. Lead data in, live proposal out, 60 seconds.

whyUsCards.title: Personalization
whyUsCards.description: Generic proposals get ignored. Personalized proposals close. The system reads each prospect's website and reflects their services, tone, and positioning back to them. Written from scratch, not templated.

whyUsCards.title: Ownership
whyUsCards.description: No monthly subscription bleeding your budget. No vendor deciding to raise prices or shut down. You own the source code, the infrastructure, and the data. Permanently.

whyUsCards.title: Support
whyUsCards.description: Personal onboarding, a video walkthrough your team can reference anytime, and one week of post-delivery support. You are not left figuring this out alone.

fearCards.title: You are probably thinking: our stack is complicated.
fearCards.sub: CRM, email, Sheets, Slack. The system connects to whatever you already use. No migration.

fearCards.title: You might be wondering if this breaks your current workflow.
fearCards.sub: It runs alongside everything you have. Nothing changes except the time you spend on proposals.

fearCards.title: You are concerned the output will not match your standards.
fearCards.sub: Revisions are part of the build. We configure, test, and refine until the output matches your bar exactly.

proposal1.teamIntro: Your point of contact. No handoffs, no account managers, no layers.

team.name: Ayush Chauhan
team.bio: Full-stack engineer specializing in AI automation for agencies and service businesses. Every engagement personally handled from architecture through deployment. 15+ systems built. Zero failed deliveries. Works async, ships fast.

proposal1.processIntro: What Working With Us Looks Like

process.title: Kickoff (Async or Call)
process.description: We map your workflow, services, and current proposal process. Can be a 15-minute call or handled entirely over email. By the end, we have everything needed to configure the system.

process.title: System Configuration
process.description: The engine gets configured with your services, pricing structure, tone of voice, and brand standards. Every proposal it generates will sound like your best strategist wrote it.

process.title: Build and QA
process.description: Test proposals generated and reviewed against your quality bar. Refinements continue until the output is indistinguishable from what your team produces manually.

process.title: Deployment and Handoff
process.description: Deployed to production with full infrastructure. You receive a video walkthrough, documentation, and complete source code. From this point, the system runs without us.

proposal1.pricingIntro: Two options. Both are one-time builds. No subscriptions, no recurring fees. You own the source code and infrastructure permanently.

pricing.name: Proposal Engine
pricing.subtitle: // Core System
pricing.description: Custom proposal automation configured for IFX's services, voice, and pricing structure.

pricing.name: Engine + AI Chatbot
pricing.subtitle: // Recommended
pricing.description: Everything above, plus an AI sales assistant embedded in every proposal. Handles objections, answers questions, and books calls for IFX around the clock.
features: AI chatbot on every proposal page

proposal1.ctaHeadline: See this running on your actual proposals.
proposal1.ctaDescription: Reply here or email Ayush directly. He will send the onboarding form. Takes about 10 minutes and the build starts the same day. Custom-configured for IFX.

lead.company_description:
IFX's Technology and Strategic Divisions work hand-in-hand to optimize, and maximize franchise development, marketing, management and operations on a daily basis. 
We serve as your personal technology partner and trusted franchise advisor who understands what it takes to build and maintain a successful franchise company.
IFX Online is a simple and intuitive modular platform you can use to manage your entire franchise organization from anywhere in the world. With more than two decades of experience, servicing 500+ brands, IFX is the leading Technology Service Provider and Strategic Advisory Firm in Franchising.
